name: ROYAL CARIBBEAN CRUISES LTD
business: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. is a vacation industry leader operating three global cruise vacation brands: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea, along with a 50% joint venture interest in TUI Cruises. The company sells cruise vacations to consumers worldwide, offering itineraries that call on over 1,000 destinations across all seven continents.

exposures.sentence: We are exposed to cyber security attacks and data breaches and the risks and costs associated with protecting our systems and maintaining data integrity and security for a discussion of the risks associated with cyber security.
Our entire fleet is equipped with Starlink through our partnership with SpaceX, bringing the next generation in shipboard connectivity and unlocking an improved guest experience.

We have continued to expand digital capabilities into our operations and have increased our focus in bringing data analytics and artificial intelligence into our processes to provide better insights for revenue management as well as in how to model our maintenance or operational actions.
the majority of our ships on order are being delivered with Liquified Natural Gas ("LNG") technology that meet all sulfur regulations without the need for an AEP system.

This includes equipping all of our new ships delivered since 2014 with Advanced Emissions Purification ("AEP") systems covering all engines and actively developing and installing AEP systems on the majority of our remaining fleet; resulting in more than than 70% of our fleet being equipped with AEP systems.

catalysts.event: Delivery of Legend of the Seas (third Icon-class ship)
catalysts.sentence: The ships on order include the third Icon-class ship, Legend of the Seas, which is expected to be delivered in 2026, the fourth and fifth Icon-class ships, which are expected to be delivered in 2027 and 2028, respectively, and the seventh Oasis-class ship, which is expected to be delivered in 2028.

catalysts.event: Delivery of fourth and fifth Icon-class ships
catalysts.sentence: The ships on order include the third Icon-class ship, Legend of the Seas, which is expected to be delivered in 2026, the fourth and fifth Icon-class ships, which are expected to be delivered in 2027 and 2028, respectively, and the seventh Oasis-class ship, which is expected to be delivered in 2028.

The ships on order include the third Icon-class ship, Legend of the Seas, which is expected to be delivered in 2026, the fourth and fifth Icon-class ships, which are expected to be delivered in 2027 and 2028, respectively, and the seventh Oasis-class ship, which is expected to be delivered in 2028.
Additionally, we signed a memorandum of understanding to build two ships of a new generation, known as Discovery-class, which are expected to enter service in 2029 and 2032, respectively.
As of December 31, 2025, Celebrity Cruises had one Edge-class ship on order, Celebrity Xcite, with an aggregate capacity of approximately 3,250 berths, which is expected to be delivered in 2028.

catalysts.event: Delivery of Celebrity River Cruises ships (2027 and 2028)
catalysts.sentence: The first four river cruise ships on order have an aggregate capacity of approximately 680 berths, including Celebrity Compass, and Celebrity Seeker , which are expected to be delivered in 2027, and two other river cruise ships expected to be delivered in 2028.

This acquired property will serve as the second destination in our Perfect Day Collection, Perfect Day Mexico, a Mexican inspired Royal Caribbean destination experience expected to open in 2027, and will serve our Western Caribbean itineraries from homeports in Texas and Florida.

catalysts.event: Launch of Points Choice loyalty program
catalysts.sentence: As announced in October 2025, we also expect to launch our "Points Choice" program in 2026, which will enable guests to apply loyalty points earned on any Royal Caribbean Group brand toward the brand program of their choice.

tamClaims.claim: The global vacation industry is a market of over $2 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: The global vacation industry represents a large and expanding market of over $2 trillion, our company currently holds a small share of this market, and we believe our differentiated vacation ecosystem and strategic expansion initiatives provide a compelling opportunity to capture additional market share.

tamClaims.claim: Industry market penetration rates in 2025: North America 5.96%, Europe 1.73%, Asia/Pacific 0.09%.
tamClaims.sentence: During 2025, industry market penetration rates were 5.96% for North America, 1.73% for Europe, and 0.09% for Asia/Pacific.

tamClaims.claim: Global cruise industry carried approximately 37 million guests in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The global cruise industry carried approximately 37 million guests in 2025, 35 million guests in 2024, and 32 million guests in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: As of December 31, 2025, approximately 47 ships on order with an estimated 113,000 berths for the global cruise market through 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, there were approximately 47 ships on order with an estimated 113,000 berths that are expected to be placed in service in the global cruise market through 2029, not taking into account ships taken out of service or ordered during these periods.
